llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Assistant Sales Manager, Pharma Solutions
job.description: About The Role Drive sales Growth: Plan sales strategy in order to achieve agreed sales target and grow sustainably in the defined territory. Find opportunities: Develop project pipeline with customers, business partners and through partnerships with technical team Close profitable deals Market Research to cover trends, regulation, competitor and growth opportunities How You Will Do It Strategic: Strategy Development, conceptualization and implementation: contribute to the development and drive the execution of the Pharma Solutions strategy. Specific responsibilities include annual and short-termed sales plans, business and market development, market research and planning, strategic direction for local promotion, and partnering with other related management teams, e.g. customer service, supply chain, product management, marketing. Operational: Perform all sales driven activities for Pharma Solutions in the assigned territory Support business growth: Apply the overall sales process, aiming to meet or exceed sales related targets (e.g. volume, cCM1 and net sales, cost, DIV, DSO). Close deals to maximize cCM1. Be responsibile for Planning Forecasting: Provide accurate sales forecast, supporting efficient planning of products and services. Close coordination with sub regional planner to ensure adequate stocking for the customers in the territory Manage Accounts: Develop lasting customer relationships to identify business trends. Key Account management of defined customers by ensuring that there is defined and documented account plans, distribution evaluation tool, customer specific business and / or technical solutions Drive growth through effective Distribution Management Manage business Development: Develop customer portfolio to grow net sales and profit. Discover and drive opportunities at customers. Strengthen opportunity finding, increase opportunity pipeline value and drive growth opportunities through effective sales pipeline management in close collaboration with the technical service team. Execute of Sales Excellence (Effectiveness of sales), pricing through CPQ, Sales Force usage and BRM compliance. Perform additional Sales related activities in close collaboration with SCM and CSO community to ensure smooth order processing and removing of potential order blocks. Actively contribute to fill innovation pipeline based on interaction and feedback from customers as well as market knowledge. Manage reports – provide regular reports on sales and allied...
